about: Pre-final year CSE student passionate about development and UI/UX design,focused on building practical and user-friendly digital solutions. Possess good communication, teamwork, and leadership skills, and currently seeking internship opportunities to gain hands-on industry experience.

growthLog.message: First line of code written — Hello World in Python
Discovered web development — built first HTML/CSS portfolio
Enrolled in B.E. CSE at LICET — systems online
Completed first full-stack project — MERN stack
Smart India Hackathon — reached national finals
TerminalOS Portfolio v2.4 — dual-mode interface shipped

projects.name: Env-guard
projects.description: Developed and published env-guard, an open-source Node.js CLI tool that prevents accidental .env exposure and detects hardcoded secrets before code reaches Git repositories.

projects.name: StillWithYou
projects.description: Developed a web application that securely stores and delivers greeting messages, voice notes, videos, and flower requests to loved ones in the future,ensuring emotional memories and wishes are never left undelivered.

projects.name: EduFeedback
projects.description: Developed a student feedback and teacher evaluation platform for the college with role-based dashboards, real-time analytics, and automated reporting, replacing traditional Google Forms workflows.

projects.name: Parky
projects.description: A smart parking finder and rental platform that helps users rent out their private parking spaces and find available parking nearby

projects.name: TerminalOS Portfolio
projects.description: An immersive OS-themed portfolio featuring a fully functional CLI and GUI dual-mode interface with xterm.js, Framer Motion animations, and a custom command parser.
